disambiguated.context: I was talking to a couple of friends about past relationships we've had; one of my friends is bisexual and the other is gay. I guess the bisexual person had a pretty normal mix of good and bad stories, but my gay friend has cheated on every single one of their partners.
disambiguated.question: Who is an unfaithful partner?
